publications.title: Morphological and mechanical behaviour of Cu–Sn alloys—a review
publications.authors: Manu, K., J Abhinav, Karthik V Shankar

publications.title: Physical Modelling of Tundish Fluid Flow: Impact of Turbulence Inhibitor Geometry on Inclusion Removal Efficiency
Thermodynamic Assessment of Tramp Element Behaviour in High-Scrap EAF Steelmaking
publications.venue: Metallurgical and Materials Transactions B, vol. XX, pp. XXX–XXX

publications.title: Electromagnetic Mould Level Sensor Response Under Varying Slag Compositions: Experimental Characterisation and Calibration
Breakout Detection in Continuous Casting Using LSTM Neural Networks on Thermocouple Array Data
publications.venue: Steel Research International, vol. XX, no. X

projects.title: Mould Flux Viscosity Measurement at Casting Temperatures
projects.desc: Developed a high-temperature viscometer setup for in-situ characterisation of mould flux rheology above 1300 °C. Results validated against plant-measured oscillation mark severity and surface defect indices.

projects.title: Scaled Water Model of Tundish Flow & Inclusion Removal
projects.desc: Built a 1:3 scale water model of a single-strand tundish to investigate the effect of turbulence inhibitors and dams on inclusion removal efficiency, using tracer injection and PIV flow mapping.

projects.title: Machine Learning Model for Breakout Prediction in Continuous Casting
projects.desc: Developed an LSTM-based early warning model for mould breakout events using thermocouple array data from a slab caster. Achieved >92% detection accuracy with a 45-second advance warning window.

projects.title: Tramp Element Dilution Strategies for High-Scrap EAF Heats
projects.desc: Investigated thermodynamic and kinetic strategies for managing Cu, Sn, and Ni accumulation in high-scrap-rate EAF steelmaking, combining FactSage modelling with industrial trial data.

projects.title: Electromagnetic Mould Level Sensor Calibration Protocol
projects.desc: Designed and validated a calibration methodology for electromagnetic mould level sensors under varying slag layer compositions and steel grades, improving signal reliability at low casting speeds.

projects.title: Digital Twin Framework for Ladle–Tundish Heat Transfer
projects.desc: Developing a physics-informed digital twin that integrates real-time temperature sensor data with a reduced-order thermal model to predict tundish steel temperature trajectories during casting sequences.

blog.title: Why Physics-Informed ML Will Outperform Black-Box Models in Steelmaking
blog.excerpt: Pure data-driven models struggle with the sparse, noisy, high-variance data environment of the steel plant. Here's the case for keeping the physics in the loop.

blog.title: The Underestimated Power of Water Models in the Age of CFD
blog.excerpt: When simulation budgets explode and validation data is scarce, a well-designed water model can still outperform a poorly validated numerical model. A defence of experimental analogue methods.

blog.title: Steel Recycling at Scale: The Tramp Element Problem No One Talks About
blog.excerpt: As scrap ratios increase globally, copper contamination becomes a fundamental barrier to quality steel production. What are our real options at the process level?
